allow: PowerShell($path = 'C:\\Users\\munar\\Munardil''s work\\TSAK web\\Thai Students Kuwait.html'; $content = Get-Content $path -Raw; $marker = '<script type="__bundler/template">'; $start = $content.IndexOf\($marker\); if \($start -lt 0\) { Write-Output "Not found" } else { $contentStart = $start + $marker.Length; $end = $content.IndexOf\('</script>', $contentStart\); $template = $content.Substring\($contentStart, $end - $contentStart\); $size = $template.Length; Write-Output "Template size: $size chars"; Write-Output "First 2000 chars:"; Write-Output $template.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2000, $size\)\) })

PowerShell($path = 'C:\\Users\\munar\\Munardil''s work\\TSAK web\\Thai Students Kuwait.html'; $content = Get-Content $path -Raw; $marker = '<script type="__bundler/template">'; $start = $content.IndexOf\($marker\); $contentStart = $start + $marker.Length; $end = $content.IndexOf\('</script>', $contentStart\); $rawJson = $content.Substring\($contentStart, $end - $contentStart\); $html = $rawJson | ConvertFrom-Json; $out = 'C:\\Users\\munar\\Munardil''s work\\TSAK web\\_design_source.html'; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($out, $html, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); Write-Output "Saved $\($html.Length\) chars to _design_source.html")
